questions.q: What linked the country coast to coast when it was completed in 1869?
questions.explanation: The transcontinental railroad connected the country from east to west.

questions.q: Through which station did millions of immigrants enter the United States?
questions.explanation: Ellis Island in New York Harbor processed millions of newcomers.

questions.q: What did workers organize to bargain for better wages and conditions?
questions.explanation: Labor unions formed in response to harsh industrial conditions.

questions.q: What did the Progressive Era focus on?
questions.explanation: Progressives fought corruption and protected workers and consumers.

questions.q: What does the Statue of Liberty symbolize?
questions.explanation: A gift from France, it became a symbol of liberty and welcome.
